mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) AS totalSize, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN file_size ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todaySize FROM sys_file WHERE
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_file WHERE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC
SELECT storage_type AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_file WHERE GROUP BY storage_type ORDER BY value DESC, storage_type ASC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(file_suffix, ''), '无后缀') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_file WHERE GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(file_suffix, ''), '无后缀') ORDER BY value DESC, name ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT suffix_data.label AS label, suffix_data.value AS value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(file_suffix, ''), '无后缀') AS label, CASE WHEN file_suffix IS NULL OR file_suffix = '' THEN '__NONE__' ELSE file_suffix END AS value FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = 0 ) suffix_data GROUP BY suffix_data.label, suffix_data.value ORDER BY count DESC, label ASC
SELECT id, file_name, file_suffix, file_size, url, storage_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag FROM sys_file WHERE ORDER BY id DESC
